hypothesis: If x is greater than 5 and y is greater than 3, then x plus y is greater than 8
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (> x 5))
(assert (> y 3))
(assert (not (> (+ x y) 8)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, if x is even then x squared is even
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (= (mod x 2) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod (* x x) 2) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is less than b and b is less than c, then a is less than c
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (< a b))
(assert (< b c))
(assert (not (< a c)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: The sum of two non-negative numbers is non-negative
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (>= x 0))
(assert (>= y 0))
(assert (not (>= (+ x y) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x equals y and y equals z, then x equals z
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(declare-const z Int)
(assert (= x y))
(assert (= y z))
(assert (not (= x z)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all real numbers x, x squared is non-negative
proof:
(declare-const x Real)
(assert (not (>= (* x x) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is greater than zero then x plus one is greater than zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (> x 0))
(assert (not (> (+ x 1) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: The maximum of two numbers is greater than or equal to each number
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const m Int)
(assert (= m (ite (> a b) a b)))
(assert (not (and (>= m a) (>= m b))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a divides b and b divides c, then a divides c
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (and (> a 0) (> b 0) (> c 0)))
(assert (= (mod b a) 0))
(assert (= (mod c b) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod c a) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, x plus zero equals x
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (= (+ x 0) x)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: The minimum of two numbers is less than or equal to each number
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const m Int)
(assert (= m (ite (< a b) a b)))
(assert (not (and (<= m a) (<= m b))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is greater than y then x plus z is greater than y plus z
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(declare-const z Int)
(assert (> x y))
(assert (not (> (+ x z) (+ y z))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, x times one equals x
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (= (* x 1) x)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is non-negative and y is non-negative, then x times y is non-negative
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (>= x 0))
(assert (>= y 0))
(assert (not (>= (* x y) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, if x is odd then x plus one is even
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (= (mod x 2) 1))
(assert (not (= (mod (+ x 1) 2) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is less than b and c is positive, then a times c is less than b times c
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (< a b))
(assert (> c 0))
(assert (not (< (* a c) (* b c))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, x squared equals x squared
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (= (* x x) (* x x))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x equals y then f of x equals f of y for any function f
proof:
(declare-fun f (Int) Int)
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (= x y))
(assert (not (= (f x) (f y))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: The absolute value of a number is non-negative
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const abs_x Int)
(assert (= abs_x (ite (>= x 0) x (- x))))
(assert (not (>= abs_x 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, if x mod 10 equals 0 then x mod 5 equals 0
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (= (mod x 10) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod x 5) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is greater than y and y is greater than z, then x is greater than z
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(declare-const z Int)
(assert (> x y))
(assert (> y z))
(assert (not (> x z)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x and y, x plus y equals y plus x
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (not (= (+ x y) (+ y x))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a number is divisible by 4, it is divisible by 2
proof:
(declare-const n Int)
(assert (> n 0))
(assert (= (mod n 4) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod n 2) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, x times zero equals zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (= (* x 0) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is non-negative then x squared is non-negative
proof:
(declare-const x Real)
(assert (>= x 0))
(assert (not (>= (* x x) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers a and b, a times b equals b times a
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(assert (not (= (* a b) (* b a))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x equals y then x squared equals y squared
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (= x y))
(assert (not (= (* x x) (* y y))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, if x is even then x plus x is even
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (= (mod x 2) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod (+ x x) 2) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is greater than b and b is greater than c, then a minus c is positive
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (> a b))
(assert (> b c))
(assert (not (> (- a c) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, x plus the negation of x equals zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (= (+ x (- x)) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is positive and y is positive, then x plus y is positive
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (> x 0))
(assert (> y 0))
(assert (not (> (+ x y) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers n, if n mod 3 equals 0 then n mod 3 equals 0
proof:
(declare-const n Int)
(assert (= (mod n 3) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod n 3) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is less than or equal to b and b is less than or equal to c, then a is less than or equal to c
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (<= a b))
(assert (<= b c))
(assert (not (<= a c)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x and y, x plus y plus z equals x plus y plus z
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(declare-const z Int)
(assert (not (= (+ (+ x y) z) (+ x (+ y z)))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is odd and y is odd, then x plus y is even
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (= (mod x 2) 1))
(assert (= (mod y 2) 1))
(assert (not (= (mod (+ x y) 2) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, if x is greater than zero then x is not equal to zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (> x 0))
(assert (= x 0))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is divisible by 6 and b is divisible by 6, then a plus b is divisible by 6
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(assert (= (mod a 6) 0))
(assert (= (mod b 6) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod (+ a b) 6) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all real numbers x and y, x plus y equals y plus x
proof:
(declare-const x Real)
(declare-const y Real)
(assert (not (= (+ x y) (+ y x))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is less than y then x minus one is less than y
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (< x y))
(assert (not (< (- x 1) y)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, zero times x equals zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (= (* 0 x) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is less than b then 2 times a is less than 2 times b
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(assert (< a b))
(assert (not (< (* 2 a) (* 2 b))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, the successor of x is greater than x
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (> (+ x 1) x)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x is greater than or equal to zero and y is greater than or equal to zero, then x times y is greater than or equal to zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (>= x 0))
(assert (>= y 0))
(assert (not (>= (* x y) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers a, b, c, a plus b equals b plus a
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (not (= (+ a b) (+ b a))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is divisible by 12 then a is divisible by 3
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(assert (> a 0))
(assert (= (mod a 12) 0))
(assert (not (= (mod a 3) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, if x is even then x divided by 2 times 2 equals x
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (= (mod x 2) 0))
(assert (not (= (* (div x 2) 2) x)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If x equals y then x minus z equals y minus z
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(declare-const z Int)
(assert (= x y))
(assert (not (= (- x z) (- y z))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x and y, x times y equals zero implies x equals zero or y equals zero
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(declare-const y Int)
(assert (= (* x y) 0))
(assert (and (not (= x 0)) (not (= y 0))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: If a is greater than b and c is negative, then a times c is less than b times c
proof:
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(declare-const c Int)
(assert (> a b))
(assert (< c 0))
(assert (not (< (* a c) (* b c))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: For all integers x, x squared plus one is greater than x squared
proof:
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (not (> (+ (* x x) 1) (* x x))))
(check-sat)
